name: Fruit and Chocolate Dream Squares
recipeInstructions:
TOPPING: In a small bowl, combine the flour, pecans, and brown sugar. Using a pastry blender or two knives, cut in the butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Set aside.
CRUST: Preheat the oven to 375°F. Grease a 9-inch square baking pan. In a small bowl, combine the flour and granulated sugar. Using a pastry blender or two knives, cut in the butter until the mixture resembles fine crumbs. Press into the prepared pan.
Bake for 20-25 minutes until set but not brown. Spread with jam. Top with Nestle Toll House milk chocolate morsels and the topping. Bake for an additional 15-20 minutes until the top is lightly browned. Cool completely; cut into 2 1/4-inch squares.
